a:r.a:t: Today: a code runner with 6 pre-installed packages. Target: a full agent workbench with file management, dev tools, and data pipelines.
— Accept ZIP/dir via /v1/upload. Extract, detect types, route to subfolders.
— Classify files (docs/data/code/images), create subfolders, move files.
— Full-text search across workspace. Path, line, snippet.
— Size, type, modified date per file.
— Recursive tree with file counts per directory.
— pip/npm into persistent layer. Cached across calls. Allowlisted.
— Clone repos into workspace. Shallow, depth-limited, read-only.
— pytest/unittest in sandbox. Structured pass/fail/error report.
— ruff/flake8/eslint. File, line, severity. Agents can auto-fix.
— Auto-profile CSV/Excel: rows, dtypes, nulls, distributions. One-call EDA.
— Drop dupes, fill nulls, normalize dates, fix encodings. Configurable.
— Apply transform across files matching a glob. Map/filter/aggregate.
— HTML/PDF report from analysis. Charts, tables, narrative from artifacts.
Hardening: Add write-size limits (50 MB/session), concurrent-access locking on workspace, swap limits on containers, AST validation before execution, and workspace TTL eviction for idle sessions.
sandbox/docker_exec.py (200 lines), sandbox/workspace.py (140 lines), data_analyst_tools.py (744 lines) — 13 new tools
